title: Initial dose optimization of tacrolimus for children with systemic lupus erythematosus based on the CYP3A5 polymorphism

interactions.evidence_quote: The results showed that weight, the CYP3A5 genotype and combined treatment with Wuzhi capsule can affect tacrolimus clearance in children with systemic lupus erythematosus. extraction.extraction_notes: Population pharmacokinetic study in pediatric SLE shows that coadministration of Wuzhi capsule reduces tacrolimus clearance, implying increased tacrolimus exposure. The explicit mechanism is not detailed.

title: Effects of Baoyuan decoction, a traditional Chinese medicine formula, on the activities and mRNA expression of seven CYP

interactions.evidence_quote: BYD decreased AUC(0-t) of phenacetin at high dosage and exhibited induction effects on CYP1A2.
